news.t: Fidelity® Grows Thematic Fund Lineup With Launch of Four New ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FRNW is an equity ETF with a total of 69 individual holdings. The top holdings are First Solar stock at 5.16%, Bloom Energy at 4.42%, GE Vernova at 4.38%, Vestas Wind Systems at 4.16%, and Nextpower at 3.88%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Clean Energy ETF (FRNW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Fidelity Clean Energy index, a market-cap-weighted index of global clean energy companies screened for environmental, social, and governance factors. FRNW was launched on Oct 5, 2021 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® Grows Thematic Fund Lineup With Launch of Four New ETFs
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Fidelity Investments expands thematic fund lineup with the launch of four new thematic ETFs.
